auth.name: Full name
auth.recoverPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions.
auth.checkEmailDescription: If the email is registered, you will receive instructions to reset your password.
auth.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.invalidLinkDescription: The recovery link is invalid or has expired.
auth.linkExpired: The link has expired or is invalid. Request a new one.

openMatches.title: Open matches
openMatches.subtitle: Find players and join a match
openMatches.comeBackLater: Come back later for new matches.
openMatches.loginRequiredDesc: You need an account to join open matches.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.subtitle: Club leagues and tournaments
competitions.noCompetitionsDesc: The club hasn't created any competitions yet.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal data
profile.savedDesc: Your data has been saved successfully.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and billing
billing.trialEndsIn: Your free trial ends in {days} days

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pushPromptDescription: Get alerts for bookings, matches, and club news.
notifications.pushActivatedDesc: You'll receive alerts for your bookings and matches.

cookies.message: We use essential cookies for site functionality and functional cookies to remember your preferences.

rgpd.title: My data and privacy
rgpd.description: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to export and delete your personal data.
rgpd.exportSuccessDesc: Your data has been downloaded successfully.
rgpd.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. Your personal data, statistics, notifications and push subscriptions will be deleted.
rgpd.deleteKeepBookings: Your booking history will be kept anonymously for the club's accounting.
rgpd.deleteConfirmLabel: Type DELETE MY DATA to confirm
rgpd.deleteSuccessDesc: Your personal data has been deleted.

onboarding.title: Set up your club
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to get your club ready

steps.clubInfoDesc: Add description, phone or contact email
steps.createCourtDesc: Add your club courts to start receiving bookings
steps.configurePricingDesc: Set prices by court, day and time slot
steps.customizePortalDesc: Upload your club logo or banner and customize colors
steps.invitePlayersDesc: Share the portal link for your members to register

wizard.title: Initial setup
wizard.subtitle: Configure the basics of your club in a few minutes
wizard.clubInfoSubtitle: Basic details your players will see on the portal
wizard.courtsSubtitle: Add available courts. You can edit or add more from the panel later
wizard.pricingSubtitle: Set a base price per hour. You can customize by day and time slot later
wizard.reviewSubtitle: Your club is configured. Here are the next steps
